title: Dense Roasted Polish Potato Roast
description: A hearty, plant-based Polish dish featuring roasted potatoes and fries, perfect for a brunch gathering.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes, onion, carrots, and mushrooms with the vegetable oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the vegetables are roasting, heat the fries according to the package instructions.
After the vegetables have roasted for 30 minutes, add the heated fries to the baking sheet and stir to combine.
Continue roasting the vegetables and fries for an additional 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
